name: part_004
file: tmp_【 #百鬼あやめ7周年新衣装3D 】百鬼あやめ７周年記念ライブ  ～天女繚華～ 【百鬼あやめ⧸ホロライブ】 [uRa-uLMea7w]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_004.mov

scenes.description: Nakiri Ayame performs her solo 3D live performance of 'Gokuraku Jodo' in her 7th anniversary costume.
A transition scene featuring visual effects and the appearance of Usada Pekora.
Nakiri Ayame and Usada Pekora perform 'Kyokon Tsuki-kyun' together on stage.

subtitles.original: 月明かり昇る刻
subtitles.english: When the moonlight rises

subtitles.original: 灯る赤提灯
subtitles.english: The red lanterns are lit

subtitles.original: 祭囃子の合図
subtitles.english: The signal of festival music

subtitles.original: ふわり 蝶が 誘い出す
subtitles.english: A butterfly gently lures you out

subtitles.original: ちょいと覗いて見てごらん
subtitles.english: Take a little peek

subtitles.original: 迷い込めば抜け出せない
subtitles.english: Once you wander in, you can't get out

subtitles.original: 楽しいことがしたいなら
subtitles.english: If you want to have some fun

subtitles.original: おいであそばせ極楽浄土
subtitles.english: Welcome to Gokuraku Jodo

subtitles.original: 歌えや歌え 心のままに
subtitles.english: Sing and sing, just as your heart desires

subtitles.original: アナタの声をさあ聞かせて
subtitles.english: Now, let me hear your voice

subtitles.original: 踊れや踊れ 時を忘れ
subtitles.english: Dance and dance, forgetting about time

subtitles.original: 今宵 共に あ狂い咲き
subtitles.english: Tonight, let's bloom wildly together

subtitles.original: 美しく咲く花も
subtitles.english: Even the flowers that bloom beautifully

subtitles.original: いつか散りゆくもの
subtitles.english: Are destined to scatter one day

subtitles.original: それならこの一夜を
subtitles.english: In that case, let's take this one night

subtitles.original: もっと熱く愛したい
subtitles.english: And love even more passionately

subtitles.original: ちょいと「いいこと」いたしましょう
subtitles.english: Let's do something "good" together

subtitles.original: これは夢か幻か
subtitles.english: Is this a dream or an illusion?

subtitles.original: 嘘も真も無い世界
subtitles.english: A world where neither lies nor truth exist

subtitles.original: ゆきましょう極楽浄土
subtitles.english: Let's go to Gokuraku Jodo

subtitles.original: 歌えや歌え 心のままに
subtitles.english: Sing and sing, just as your heart desires

subtitles.original: 乱れる髪も気にせずに
subtitles.english: Without even caring about disheveled hair

subtitles.original: 踊れや踊れ 時を忘れ
subtitles.english: Dance and dance, forgetting about time

subtitles.original: 今宵 共に あ狂い咲き
subtitles.english: Tonight, let's bloom wildly together

subtitles.original: どいつもこいつもなんだかやっぱノーてんき
subtitles.english: Everyone's just so carefree after all

subtitles.original: 気になるアンタの悩みもきっとしてあるでしょ
subtitles.english: I'm sure you have some worries too

subtitles.original: ざっとでハンパな憂鬱ももう群れおなじ
subtitles.english: Rough and half-baked depressions are all the same

subtitles.original: アンタの頭の中はグチャグチャさ
subtitles.english: Inside your head is a total mess

subtitles.original: ドンマイ兵がいじけないもーていしき
subtitles.english: Don't mind, soldiers, don't get discouraged, it's a net-consciousness

subtitles.original: いけないいけない事柄なんてないから
subtitles.english: Because there's no such thing as 'bad' things

subtitles.original: イーアルサンスーじゃんけんぽんでさあおゆき
subtitles.english: One, two, three, rock-paper-scissors, now go

subtitles.original: ウーリュウチーパで天に召されてく
subtitles.english: Five, six, seven, eight, being summoned to heaven

subtitles.original: キミは
subtitles.english: You are...

subtitles.original: もうハイスピードだ
subtitles.english: ...already at high speed

subtitles.original: ありゃま こりゃま お待ちかね
subtitles.english: My oh my, here we go, what you've been waiting for

subtitles.original: ハチャメチャなドラマ
subtitles.english: A chaotic drama

subtitles.original: 派手にドラが鳴るよ
subtitles.english: The gong rings out loudly

subtitles.original: い・い・の？づっきゅん
subtitles.english: Is it okay? Heart-thump

subtitles.original: I Love You なのな
subtitles.english: It's 'I Love You', you know

subtitles.original: 四六時中 愛を頂戴
subtitles.english: Give me love 24/7

subtitles.original: はて？
subtitles.english: Huh?

subtitles.original: い・い・っ！？ずばっきゅん
subtitles.english: It's okay!? Boom-thump

subtitles.original: あ・い・あ・い・もうらぶちゅう
subtitles.english: Lovey-dovey, already in love

subtitles.original: 1/2 じゃもの足りない
subtitles.english: 1/2 is not enough
